x86_64-linux-gnu-gcc  -ffreestanding -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -nostdlib -m64 -mcmodel=kernel -mno-red-zone -ffreestanding -nostdlib -fno-pic  -nostdlib -T/workspaces/NOS-cpp/arch/x86_64/linker.ld -nostdlib -static CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/kernel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/console.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/syscalls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/filesystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/neural_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/federated.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/consensus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/shell_simple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/services.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/arch/x86_64/arch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/arch/x86_64/gdt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/arch/x86_64/idt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/arch/x86_64/paging.cpp.o boot.o interrupts.o -o kernel
